Friday, May 1, 2026
Top Story

Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss

A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

World News

Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss

A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

Hegseth says clock paused on deadline to seek approval for Iran war

The US defence secretary says the timer for the president to report to Congress 'pauses or stops' in a ceasefire.

BBC · world · Read more

Iran's supreme leader vows to protect nuclear and missile capabilities

Iran's supreme leader affirms commitment to maintaining nuclear and missile programs amid ongoing tensions.

AP · world · Read more

Trump administration says its war in Iran has been 'terminated' before 60-day deadline

The administration claims the Iran war has been terminated prior to the War Powers Act deadline for congressional approval.

Seattle News

Seattle May Day 2026 rallies in Cal Anderson Park for downtown march

May Day organizers call for 'No Work, No School, No Shopping' with messages focusing on communities over ICE, workers over billionaires, and services over war.

Capitol Hill Seattle News · Read more

Seattle Mayor Katie Wilson calls for Starbucks boycott

Mayor Wilson's first move after winning election was calling for a Starbucks boycott, prompting the company to consider relocating to Nashville.

MyNorthwest · Read more

Seattle weighs pause on new data center proposals

City officials consider pausing new data center proposals as multiple plans emerge, though details remain early and unclear.

KING 5 · Read more

Paid parking permits start at Northgate and Shoreline Sound Transit garages

Starting May 1, commuters will need paid permits for parking at busy light rail stations, ending the early morning rush for spots.

KOMO News · Read more

Technology

Nvidia B300 server prices double in China amid chip smuggling crackdown

Strong demand for AI computing equipment in China has nearly doubled prices for Nvidia's B300 servers to about $1 million each as black-market supply dries up.

Reuters · News · Read more

OpenAI cleared for AWS and Google Cloud deployment

OpenAI receives clearance for AWS and Google Cloud integration, while enterprise agents face new security concerns over hidden web-page commands.

NeuralBuddies · News · Read more

GPT-5.5 vs GPT-5.4 comparison shows modest improvements

GPT-5.5 offers 2x the per-token price with identical latency and context window, showing improvements on 9 of 10 benchmarks compared to GPT-5.4.

LLM Stats · News · Read more

Musk and Altman face off in high-stakes AI trial

Elon Musk and Sam Altman face off in Oakland court over alleged betrayal and competing visions for AI development.
